name: Tax Relief for Beer Lost by Casualty or Act of God

eligibility.description: Brewers who suffer a loss of product and file a claim within 6 months of the event, provided they were not indemnified by insurance for the tax.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a refund, credit, or relief from tax liability for beer lost or destroyed by fire, theft, casualty, or act of God before title transfer.
